channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [INOVSYNTH] Innovassynth Technologies (India) Ltd Changes Website Post Merger and Name Change
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Innovassynth Technologies (India) Ltd, formerly known as Innovassynth Investments Limited, has changed its website following the Scheme of Merger by Absorption of Innovassynth Technologies (India) Limited with and into Innovassynth Investments Limited. The company's name has also been changed from ‘Innovassynth Investments Limited’ to ‘Innovassynth Technologies (India) Limited’. The new website, www.innovassynth.com, is now functional and contains all the necessary information as required under Regulation 46 of the SEBI LODR.

  • Scheme of Merger by Absorption of Innovassynth Technologies (India) Limited with and into Innovassynth Investments Limited
  • Change of name from ‘Innovassynth Investments Limited’ to ‘Innovassynth Technologies (India) Limited’
  • New website: www.innovassynth.com
  • Website contains all necessary information as required under Regulation 46 of the SEBI LODR

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INNOVASSYNTH INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [GLENMARK] Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Launches GLIPIQ (Semaglutide) in India, Setting a New Benchmark in Affordability
item.description:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Ltd (Glenmark), a research-led, global pharmaceutical company, announced the launch of GLIPIQ® (semaglutide) in India for the management of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus (T2DM). GLIPIQ® aims to expand access to GLP-1 therapy and enable earlier treatment initiation across a broader patient population. The product is available in both vial and pre-filled pen formulations, with the vial formulation supporting physician-guided dosing and a cost-effective treatment pathway. The weekly cost of treatment with GLIPIQ® vials ranges from ₹325 to ₹440. Glenmark is also introducing ‘Sankalp’, a patient support program (PSP) designed to support therapy initiations and improve comfort with injectable treatment.

  • Glenmark Pharmaceuticals launches GLIPIQ® (semaglutide) in India for T2DM management
  • GLIPIQ® aims to expand access to GLP-1 therapy and enable earlier treatment initiation
  • Product available in both vial and pre-filled pen formulations
  • Vial formulation supports physician-guided dosing and a cost-effective treatment pathway
  • Weekly cost of treatment with GLIPIQ® vials ranges from ₹325 to ₹440
  • Glenmark introduces ‘Sankalp’, a patient support program (PSP)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GLENMARK PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [FRACTAL] Fractal Analytics' Board Meeting Approves Business Units Sale, Investments, and Amendment to AOA
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fractal Analytics Ltd's Board of Directors held a meeting on March 20, 2026, and approved several key items. The Company is set to sell and transfer business units to Analytics Vidhya Educon Private Limited for INR 10.9 crore. Additionally, Fractal Analytics will invest INR 39.4 crore in Analytics Vidhya Educon Private Limited. The investment limit in Fractal Analytics Inc. has been increased by INR equivalent of USD 4.5 crore. Fractal US will invest USD 0.3 crore in Asper.Ai Inc. Lastly, the Board approved amendments to the Articles of Association of the Company.

  • Sale and transfer of business units to Analytics Vidhya Educon Private Limited for INR 10.9 crore
  • Investment of INR 39.4 crore in Analytics Vidhya Educon Private Limited
  • Increase in investment limit in Fractal Analytics Inc. by INR equivalent of USD 4.5 crore
  • Fractal US to invest USD 0.3 crore in Asper.Ai Inc.
  • Amendment to the Articles of Association of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FRACTAL | Category: Investment

item.title: [DELHIVERY] NCLT Approves Scheme of Amalgamation for Delhivery Ltd with Spoton Logistics and Spoton Supply Chain Solutions
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), New Delhi has approved the Scheme of Amalgamation for merger of Spoton Logistics Private Limited and Spoton Supply Chain Solutions Private Limited into Delhivery Limited. The order was passed on March 20, 2026, and the appointed date of the scheme is April 1, 2025. The scheme will come into effect upon filing of a certified true copy of the order with the Registrar of Companies.

  • NCLT approves the Scheme of Amalgamation for Delhivery Ltd with Spoton Logistics and Spoton Supply Chain Solutions
  • The appointed date of the scheme is April 1, 2025
  • The scheme will come into effect upon filing of a certified true copy of the order with the Registrar of Companies
  • Delhivery Ltd is a wholly owned subsidiary and no new shares will be allotted or issued

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Delhivery Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [DRREDDY] Dr. Reddy’s Launches India’s First DCGI-Approved Semaglutide Injection ‘Obeda®’ for Type 2 Diabetes
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dr. Reddy’s Laboratories Ltd. has announced the launch of its injectable semaglutide under the brand name Obeda®, marking an important step in expanding access to advanced GLP-1 receptor agonist–based therapy for the management of type 2 diabetes in India. The company is the first Indian company to receive Drugs Controller General of India (DCGI) approval for generic semaglutide. This launch underscores the company’s Day-1 entry into the segment upon patent expiry, demonstrating its readiness to serve unmet patient needs in India. The Obeda® injection has shown non-inferior efficacy and similar safety to the innovator drug in a head-to-head Phase-III clinical study. It is available in 2 mg and 4 mg strengths and comes in a pre-filled, disposable format for subcutaneous, once-a-week administration with a user-friendly pen device.

  • Dr. Reddy’s launches India’s first DCGI-approved Semaglutide injection ‘Obeda®’ for Type 2 Diabetes
  • Obeda® has shown non-inferior efficacy and similar safety to the innovator drug in a head-to-head Phase-III clinical study
  • Dr. Reddy’s is the first Indian company to receive Drugs Controller General of India (DCGI) approval for generic semaglutide
  • Obeda® is available in 2 mg and 4 mg strengths and comes in a pre-filled, disposable format for subcutaneous, once-a-week administration with a user-friendly pen device
  • Dr. Reddy’s aims to introduce generic semaglutide in several countries, subject to regulatory approval

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DR.REDDY'S LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [RCL] Radhagobind Commercial Ltd. to Hold 5th COC Meeting on 5th February, 2026
item.description:
Radhagobind Commercial Ltd. has scheduled the 5th Meeting of the Committee of Creditors (COC) on 5th February, 2026 at 4:00 PM IST. The meeting will take place at Baithussalam, Balankinar, Kattampally Road Near Indus Motors Maruthi Service Centre, Kannur 670011 Kerala and through Video Conferencing. The agenda includes discussion on the progress of the Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP), evaluation of resolution plans, CIRP cost, and interim finance from financial creditors. Najeeb T P, the Interim Resolution Professional, will chair the meeting.

  • Radhagobind Commercial Ltd. schedules 5th COC Meeting on 5th February, 2026
  • Meeting to be chaired by Najeeb T P, the Interim Resolution Professional
  • Discussion on the progress of the CIRP and actions taken by the IRP
  • Update on the receipt and evaluation of Resolution Plans
  • Discussion on CIRP cost, additional support service cost, and interim finance

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Radhagobind Commercial Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ZYDUSLIFE] Zydus Lifesciences Launches Innovative, Reusable Semaglutide Injection Pen in India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Zydus Lifesciences Limited has launched Semaglutide Injection under the brand names – SEMAGLYNTM, MASHEMATM and ALTERMETM, upon patent expiry in India. The novel pen device, available for patients in a prefilled cartridge, is administered using a patient-friendly reusable pen. The drug will be used for treating both Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus and Obesity indications. The reusable multi-dose pen device is expected to improve adherence, enhance convenience, and lower the overall therapy cost. The average monthly cost of the treatment is approximately Rs. 2,200.

  • Zydus launches Semaglutide Injection in India under the brand names SEMAGLYNTM, MASHEMATM and ALTERMETM.
  • The novel pen device is reusable, innovative, and patient-friendly with a prefilled cartridge.
  • The drug is approved by the Drug Controller General of India (DCGI) for treating Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus and Obesity indications.
  • The reusable multi-dose pen device is expected to improve adherence, enhance convenience, and lower the overall therapy cost.
  • The average monthly cost of the treatment is approximately Rs. 2,200.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SUNPHARMA] Sun Pharma Launches Semaglutide Injection Under Brand Names Noveltreat, Sematrinity in India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Limited has announced the launch of its semaglutide injection under the brand names Noveltreat and Sematrinity in India. Noveltreat is indicated for chronic weight management in adults and is available in five dose strengths. Sematrinity is indicated for treatment of adults with insufficiently controlled type 2 diabetes mellitus and is available in two dose strengths. The weekly therapy costs for both drugs are significantly lower than the innovator brand, making them more affordable. The prefilled pens for both drugs are developed by leading global pharmaceutical device suppliers and manufactured in Europe.

  • Sun Pharma launches semaglutide injection under brand names Noveltreat and Sematrinity in India
  • Noveltreat is indicated for chronic weight management in adults and Sematrinity for treatment of adults with insufficiently controlled type 2 diabetes mellitus
  • Noveltreat is available in five dose strengths and Sematrinity in two dose strengths
  • Weekly therapy costs for both drugs are significantly lower than the innovator brand
  • Prefilled pens for both drugs are developed by leading global pharmaceutical device suppliers and manufactured in Europe

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUN PHARMACEUTICAL INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [HARISH] Harish Textile Engineers Ltd. Faces Fine of Rs. 50,000 Over Delayed Reply in NCLT Matter
item.description:
Harish Textile Engineers Ltd. has received an Order Sheet of Hearing from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, in a matter involving M/s. Kamlesh Corporation. The Company's reply was filed with a delay, which the Tribunal condoned subject to a cost of Rs. 50,000 to be deposited in the Prime Minister’s National Relief Fund (PMNRF) within 7 days. The matter has been adjourned to 14 April, 2026. The Company is seeking legal advice and will attend/respond at the scheduled hearing accordingly.

  • Harish Textile Engineers Ltd. has received an Order Sheet of Hearing from the NCLT, Mumbai Bench, in a matter involving M/s. Kamlesh Corporation
  • The Company's reply was filed with a delay, which the Tribunal condoned subject to a cost of Rs. 50,000 to be deposited in the PMNRF within 7 days
  • The matter has been adjourned to 14 April, 2026
  • The Company is seeking legal advice and will attend/respond at the scheduled hearing accordingly

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Harish Textile Engineers Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [NUVOCO] Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd Subsidiary, Vadraj Cement Limited, Approves Allotment of INR 300,00,00,000 Series B CCDs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Vadraj Cement Limited, has approved the allotment of 30,000 unsecured unlisted, compulsorily convertible debentures (Series B CCDs) worth INR 300,00,00,000 to certain investors. The allotment was made on a private placement basis as per the terms and conditions set out in the securities subscription and debenture trustee agreement executed by and between the Company, Vadraj and Beacon Trusteeship Limited.

  • Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd's subsidiary, Vadraj Cement Limited, approved the allotment of INR 300,00,00,000 Series B CCDs to certain investors.
  • The allotment was made on a private placement basis.
  • The Series B CCDs are unsecured, unlisted, and compulsorily convertible.
  • The face value of each CCD is INR 1,00,000.
  • The CCDs are convertible into 2,604 fully paid-up equity shares of Vadraj having a face value of INR 10 each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd | Category: Investment
